title: King Riku Is Protected
description: Pages 13–17 focus on king riku is protected, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Diamante, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as zoro defeats Pica, protecting King Riku and proving that Doflamingo's strongest defenses can be broken.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Try and guess it! What these confetti are!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm going to release my power now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Look! How beautiful they are! Almost like StarJust!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Robin- San! They're coming this way too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: doesn't look like we've got anywhere to run...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Captain! You are in danger yourself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You are right to be afraid!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This Stardust can take out an entire army!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Even survival is next to impos- Bible!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'm glad this is a sunflower field. Forgive me for cutting short your beauty!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Write and wriggle, it's useless! Adios!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: I am not the captain of the kind of army that would fall prey to an attack of this caliber!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Have you lost your friggin' mind!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: He's fucking deflecting every single one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: This guy... it's like he thinks he can avoid getting wet even if it was raining!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Uhahaha! You sure are clumsy! How could you trip at a time like this!?

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: No! Stop, Rebecca! They're still falling!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: That's unforgiv- able! Diamante, you coward!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: Uhahaha! That's right, Rebecca! Don't forgive me! Fight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Come! I'll end you with these very hand! Just like I did your mother!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: How long are they going to keep falling!? This flower umbrella is at its limit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Let go of me, Robin! I'll get that...

summary: King Riku Is Protected advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Diamante, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
